summary: Cortex Catalyst now supports live documentation Q&A with transparent source attribution, using an initial subset of the Cortex documentation corpus.

entries.title: Interactive Cortex documentation search launched
entries.description: You can now ask natural-language questions directly against the Cortex documentation corpus and receive AI-generated answers.

entries.title: Transparent source attribution for answers
entries.description: The assistant now explicitly flags whether its answers are derived from its pre-trained knowledge or retrieved directly from the official documentation corpus.

entries.title: Citations are currently blank
entries.description: Citations in answers do not display links because the underlying source material points to internal storage buckets instead of public documentation URLs.

entries.title: Advanced metadata filtering is inactive
entries.description: Filtering your documentation searches by specific product, version, or content type is currently unavailable.

entries.title: Limited initial documentation coverage
entries.description: Answers are restricted to a subset of 30 FluidTopics documentation maps out of the planned total of over 400.
